items.title: Presenter Pack
items.description: All-in-one judge presentation resource: 2-min walkthrough script, Methods & Rigor presenter cues, full speech scripts, Q&A prep, and ISEF display guidance.

items.title: Talking Story
items.description: 20-minute talking story script by Yana Evteeva: analogy-driven educational lecture covering the gut–brain axis, pilot data, and the D→X→M→Y simulator pipeline.

items.title: Alternative Talking Script
items.description: Alternative judge presentation script by Yana Evteeva: concise mechanistic walkthrough with Q&A cheat sheet and 20-second fallback answer.

items.title: Study Guide & Reference
items.description: Student edition study guide: key terms, biology primer, pipeline walkthrough, pilot data explained, glossary, and judge Q&A preparation.

items.title: Image Credits
items.description: ISEF-compliant image credits for all embedded figures: gut–brain axis concept illustrations, trifold visuals, and application screenshots.

items.title: User Guide
items.description: Judge-facing app walkthrough with screenshots: all screens, Presenter Mode, badges, and UI conventions.

items.title: Presentation Addendum
items.description: Companion to the approved abstract; limitations, lessons learned, and dataset-reality roadmap. Does not modify the approved abstract.

items.title: External Datasets Overview
items.description: Reference datasets, bundling details, data build notes, and licensing for all external sources used in CogniBiome.

items.title: References & Licenses
items.description: Licenses and attribution notes for all offline reference snapshots used in CogniBiome.

items.title: Trifold — Full Design & Visuals
items.description: Complete trifold board design with all five embedded printable visuals: scatter plots, bar chart, pipeline diagram, reproducibility box, and fiber-to-cognition pathway schematic.

items.title: Trifold — Top Banner
items.description: Science fair trifold top banner: project title, student info, what this is/is not, and key idea.

items.title: Trifold — Left Panel
items.description: Science fair trifold left panel: abstract, research question, hypothesis, and background research.

items.title: Trifold — Center Panel
items.description: Science fair trifold center panel: materials, procedure, and results (pilot correlation table, n=66).

items.title: Trifold — Right Panel
items.description: Science fair trifold right panel: analysis, conclusion, limitations, future directions, and suggested visuals.

items.title: Project Abstract (PDF → JSON)
items.description: Extracted text from Project Abstract.pdf, stored as JSON for offline Docs viewer.

items.title: Project Plan (PDF → JSON)
items.description: Extracted text from Project Plan.pdf, stored as JSON for offline Docs viewer.

items.title: Implementation Plan
items.description: Build roadmap used during development (Phase 1–3). Engineering reference.

items.title: Developer Reference Guide
items.description: Technical developer reference: React source structure, screen-by-screen controls, data flow, and repo layout. Internal use.

items.title: User Requirements (UR)
items.description: Primary user-level scope and acceptance criteria.

items.title: BRD
items.description: Business requirements and success metrics.

items.title: GUI Spec
items.description: Screens and flows for judge walkthrough.

items.title: SRS Requirements (Traceable)
items.description: Functional and non-functional requirements with traceability.

items.title: Database Schema
items.description: Entities and relationships.

items.title: Data Contracts
items.description: Ingestion and internal data shapes.

items.title: NFR Budgets
items.description: Performance budgets for demo reliability.

items.title: Test Plan & CI
items.description: Test cases and CI commands.

items.title: Agentic Prompt Gates
items.description: Prompt-level guardrails for automation.

items.title: Technical Requirements (TRD)
items.description: Implementation guidance and constraints.

items.title: Assumptions
items.description: Assumptions to revisit and validate.

items.title: Open Questions
items.description: Unknowns and blockers tracking.

items.title: Questionnaire Answers
items.description: Answered questionnaire to ground requirements.

items.title: Pilot Dataset (n=66)
items.description: De-identified pilot dataset used for dashboard validation.

items.title: Public Datasets Manifest
items.description: Manifest of bundled reference snapshots with provenance and sha256.

items.title: NHANES Nutrient Reference (2021–2022)
items.description: Nutrient variable codebook ranges from NHANES DR1TOT_L (2021–2022). No participant-level data.

items.title: HMP Reference Snapshot
items.description: Offline-friendly index of official HMP/iHMP community profiling resources.

items.title: American Gut Reference Snapshot
items.description: Offline-friendly index of the American Gut Project primary accessions and entry points.

items.title: MetaboLights Reference Snapshot
items.description: Small, offline index of MetaboLights studies relevant to the gut-brain / microbiome context.

items.title: Metabolomics Workbench Reference Snapshot
items.description: Small, offline index of Metabolomics Workbench studies relevant to gut microbiome/metabolome topics.
